hero.title: Turn exchange API keys into a one-click trading workflow.
hero.description: An automated trading bot platform built for Binance and OKX futures.

trend_following_core.name: Helix Momentum X
trend_following_core.description: A trend-following futures engine that reacts to momentum continuation and exits aggressively when volatility breaks structure.

trend_breakout_accel.name: Helix Breakout Pro
trend_breakout_accel.description: Focuses on high-momentum breakouts with quick short-term entries and exits, utilizing dynamic trailing stops.

strategy.name: Helix Momentum X
strategy.subtitle: A trend-following futures engine that reacts to momentum continuation and exits aggressively when volatility breaks structure.
strategy.bullet1: Adaptive moving-average and momentum filter to avoid low-quality chop.
strategy.bullet2: Position sizing, stop-loss and max drawdown are controlled at the account layer.
strategy.bullet3: Supports Binance and OKX futures with a shared strategy interface.
strategy.riskText: Digital asset derivatives involve significant volatility. Past performance is illustrative only and does not guarantee future returns.

login.title: Client Access
login.subtitle: Accounts are provisioned by administrators. Clients can sign in and change their password after first login.

dashboard.title: Minimal setup. Maximum clarity.
dashboard.description: Enter your exchange credentials, optionally tune a few risk controls, and launch the bot in one flow.
dashboard.apiDesc: Credentials are encrypted before storage. The UI only shows a masked key preview after saving.
dashboard.riskWarning: Digital asset trading involves significant risk. Proceed with caution.
dashboard.sandboxHint: Enable when using OKX demo, Binance testnet, or other sandbox API keys. The saved flag is what the bot uses when it runs.
dashboard.symbolLockedHint: The trading symbol is locked while the bot is running. Stop the bot before switching it.
